---
title: "server best practices"
author: "Haley Faucher"
date: "2026-07-15"
---

# Best Practices
- Use reactive variables to represent all information that will change when a species updates
    - Species code, data, is_absolute, etc.
    - As well as other variables that might change, latitude and longitude
- Use observeEvents to handle user input
    - Only allow a user to generate an analysis after pressing the generate button
        - Any automatic updates cause a decrease in loading speed.
- Use leafletProxy to update the map, do not render a new map
    - Only use leafletOutput once, and update the polygons on top of it
- Delegate computations to other functions
    - generate_custom_analysis
